text: Summarize this issue in one sentence.
Translate this paragraph to English.
Rewrite this commit message to be clearer.
Give me a two-line status update.
Extract three action items from this note.
List all TODO markers from this snippet.
Convert this bullet list into a checklist.
Shorten this sentence without changing meaning.
Correct grammar in this text only.
Provide a concise title for this document.
Turn this paragraph into plain language.
Generate a one-line release note.
Make this sentence more polite.
Return only the JSON keys from this object.
Split this sentence into two shorter ones.
Provide a direct yes or no answer only.
Read README and list core modules.
Compare two API designs and recommend one.
Draft a three-step migration plan for this package.
Review this function and suggest simplifications.
Analyze tradeoffs between caching and pagination here.
Outline a lightweight testing strategy for this module.
Suggest boundaries for this service decomposition.
Identify assumptions in this integration proposal.
Propose naming conventions for these new endpoints.
Audit this prompt template for ambiguity.
Provide a rollout checklist for this feature flag.
Create acceptance criteria for this user story.
Summarize architecture boundaries for this component.
Recommend logging fields for this workflow.
Suggest a safer retry policy for these calls.
Explain this design to a new team member.
Assess deployment rollback risk before production release.
Production API is timing out; help debug root cause quickly.
Investigate exception stack trace and identify likely failing layer.
Review this data migration script for overwrite risk.
Check this delete job for accidental broad match behavior.
We saw partial writes in prod, propose safe recovery steps.
Analyze incident timeline and identify highest-risk gap.
Evaluate canary failure and decide rollback or continue.
Inspect this auth change for privilege escalation risk.
Review SQL update script for destructive edge cases.
Assess operational risk of changing queue visibility timeout.
Find probable root cause for memory leak after deploy.
Estimate blast radius if this feature toggle is misconfigured.
Audit this backup restore runbook for missing safeguards.
Check this hotfix plan for race condition risk.
Assess security impact of disabling certificate validation temporarily.
Provide a full architecture redesign plan with milestones and risk matrix.

Write a comprehensive technical strategy for multi-region failover, including goals, constraints, phased delivery, ownership model, dependencies, security implications, validation gates, and explicit rollback criteria for each milestone.
Create a detailed roadmap comparing three platform options, include cost model assumptions, migration sequencing, capability gaps, stakeholder impact, staffing plan, and measurable success criteria.
Design an end-to-end operating model for this system with governance boundaries, incident response responsibilities, SLA tiers, escalation paths, and quarterly review checkpoints.

Develop a complete modernization proposal spanning architecture principles, decomposition strategy, data contract evolution, rollout safety controls, observability standards, and long-term maintenance risks.
Prepare an extensive competitive analysis and strategic positioning report with technical differentiators, implementation tradeoffs, timeline uncertainty, and mitigation options.
Create a long-form plan for replacing legacy workflow orchestration with policy-driven routing, including transition architecture, compatibility layer design, pilot scope, and cutover checkpoints.
Draft a deeply detailed governance framework for AI-assisted code operations, covering approval flows, audit evidence, exception handling, and policy lifecycle management.
Propose a comprehensive transformation blueprint for release engineering with maturity levels, process metrics, ownership handoffs, and tooling investment priorities.
Build a full technical due diligence report for this architecture, including threat model assumptions, resilience posture, data integrity controls, and unresolved critical questions.
Author a complete enterprise integration strategy that aligns domain boundaries, shared contracts, data lifecycle controls, and phased migration governance across teams.
Produce a deeply structured proposal for policy-as-code adoption with capability milestones, rollout sequencing, compliance checkpoints, and measured decision quality goals.
Design a full lifecycle operating handbook for production AI routing, covering experimentation guardrails, evaluation methodology, deployment approvals, and continuous improvement loops.
Write an exhaustive architecture review package with context, assumptions, alternatives, impact analysis, failure modes, and executive-level recommendation narrative.
Create a complete implementation master plan for cross-team platform consolidation with risk heatmap, dependency mapping, phased milestones, and acceptance criteria.
Develop a full governance and reliability blueprint for mission-critical release workflows, including policy controls, exception routing, and auditable evidence requirements.
